headline: US Invests $250 Million in Billionaire’s Startup for Chip Making
summary: (Bloomberg) -- I-Pulse Inc. will receive $250 million in US funding for semiconductor and pulsed-power development as the venture co-founded by Robert Friedland joins American efforts to reduce reliance on foreign-chip supply chains.Most Read from BloombergInvestor Who Scored 900% Win in 2008 Crisis Has New Big Short BetApple Shares Sink After Sweeping Price Hikes Hit iPads and MacsStocks Whipsaw as Micron Surges While Apple Sinks: Markets WrapGrand Ole Opry House Up For Sale by Owner Ryman Hosp

headline: DOW Announces $100 Million Investment to Expand Silicone Capabilities
summary: Dow is investing $100 million through 2027 to expand specialty silicones capacity and innovation across mobility, electronics and healthcare.
